chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-167 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of main case 3.For hearing of MA 1610/24 17-10-2024 Mr. Saeed Jamal Lund, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG. **** On 11.10.2024, none was present on behalf of applicant. Today counsel for applicant submits that applicant is not in contact with him. Under such circumstances, this Crl.Misc. Application along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
